creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to 6.1.0

Changes:        https://github.com/jupyter/jupyter_console/commits/master

Patch: https://people.FreeBSD.org/~sunpoet/patch/devel-py-jupyter_console.txt

I'm working on the devel/py-prompt_toolkit 3.x update. jupyter_console 6.0.0 only supports prompt_toolkit 2.0.x. It won't build without this update due to conflicts between prompt_toolkit 2.x and 3.x.
